codeReview.summary: The AWQ dual GEMV kernel is properly integrated into the C dispatch path. The engine correctly selects the AWQ dual kernel (12 params) when awq_mode=True, falling back to GPTQ dual (14 params) when awq_mode=False. The _launch_ffn_gate_up_silu() method properly handles both AWQ and GPTQ paths with appropriate parameter counts.

issues.description: Test functions return True/False instead of using assert. While this works for the manual test runner, pytest expects test functions to return None. This causes PytestReturnNotNoneWarning when run via pytest.
Tests skip gracefully when weights are not available, but don't actually verify AWQ kernel selection on a real engine with weights loaded. Full E2E validation requires dev server with model weights.

summary: PASS: The AWQ dual GEMV kernel is correctly integrated into the C dispatch path. Kernel selection works as expected (AWQ mode = 12 params, GPTQ mode = 14 params). The implementation properly falls back to GPTQ dual kernel when AWQ kernel is not available. Minor test style issues (returning True/False instead of assert) are non-blocking.
